calendar.matters:
Petn. To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Marylon M. Boyd, appearing for petitioner, Dennis Massina, appearing for objector.
Ms. Boyd stated that she did not recieve a copy of the trust agreement unitl 6/07. The court stated that counsel recived the amendment to the trust agreement in 3/07. Ms. Boyd stated that she wishes the court to know that she feel that her client has the right to try the matter. The court orders that both matters are to be denied. In regards to the validity of the trust, this petition was not properly served, no summons. The Quiet Title is denied for lack of standing.
COMMISSIONER: DOROTHY MC MATH, REPORTER:KATY BESAMIN CSR#11722, CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON, BALIFF:F. SMITH

Petition To Quiet Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Denied

Petn. To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust
Off Calendar Jul-16-2007 Continued To Jul-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Dennis Mesina appearing for Moses Lancelin. Marylon Boyd, counsel for Debra Martin is not in court. Mr. Mesina has received a reply by fax that did not address the Debra Martin's standing issue. Reply was not filed. Matter is continued to 7/30. Mr. Mesina will notify Ms. Boyd. If she fails to appear or to file a reply, petition will be denied. Mr. Mesina made an oral request for sanctions. Court can not consider it orally.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Drocco.

Petition To Quiet Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Jul-16-2007 Continued To Jul-30-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petn. To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust
Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Continued To Jul-16-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Quiet Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Continued To Jul-16-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petn. To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust
Off Calendar May-21-2007 Continued To Jun-18-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Dennis Mesina appearing for respondent Moses Lancelin. Clifford Fried specially appearing for Sergio Iantorno. Marylon Boyd appearing for and with petitioner Debora Martin. Mr. Fried has filed a Petition for Unlawful Detainer and it is now an ejectment. Ms. Boyd has filed a Petition to Quiet Title. It is a civil complaint and Summons was not issued. Ms. Boyd wanted to consolidate the proceedings. Court questioned what will be consolidating. The only issue is the validity of trust. Issue on Ms. Martin's standing to question the trust if she was taken out of the trust by the 2002 Amendment addressed . Ms. Boyd intented to file a reply. Mr. Mesina's client has the trust amendment and he will file the original with the Court and provide a copy to Ms. Boyd. Matter is continued to 6/18.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR#2542. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Thompson.

Petition To Quiet Title To Real Property
Off Calendar May-21-2007 Continued To Jun-18-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petn. To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust
Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Continued To May-21-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Quiet Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Continued To May-21-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petn. To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust
Off Calendar Mar-05-2007 Continued To Apr-23-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Marylon Boyd appearing for and with petitioner Debora Martin. Dennis Mesina appearing for respondent Moses Lancelin. Both counsel argeed to a continuance to allow Ms. Boyd to respond to the objections filed last Friday. Matter is continued to 4/23.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: J. Peralta.

Petn. To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust
Off Calendar Jan-22-2007 Continued To Mar-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Marylon Boyd appearing for and with petitioner Debora Martin. Dennis Mesina specially appearing for Moses Lancelin. Mr. Mesina was informed by Mr. Green, agent for Mr. Lancelin that Mr. Lancelin has not been personally served. Court finds service was proper by mail. Mr. Mesina is having discussion with Mr. Lancelin to represent him. Ms. Boyd asked for an order to the bank to release the Trust Instrument. Court suggested that she try using a Subpoena. Counsel asked for an order for preliminary injunction. She will need to petition for that. Matter is continued to 3/5/07.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
